ddt:Target.Name: Sunroof_L38_Slot
ddt:Target.Description:
1ere Edition : 05 oct 2007
Pilote Developpement Electronique : JP ALLART (IT LINK) tel: 54221
Base Edition : Diag des Systèmes, Eric Lefèvre

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Description:
Certains services sont interdits dans certains modes de diagnostics

(ex:ReadMemoryByAddress interdit au SAV)

Le mode de fonctionnement par défaut avant l'envoi d'une requête

"StartDiagnosticSession" est le mode Après Vente

format données:

10 00

| |_______ A0 pour le mode Diagnostic Etudes

| B0 pour le mode Diagnostic Contrôles en chaîne

| C0 pour le mode Diagnostic Après Vente

| 80 pour le mode Diag Fournisseur

|

|_________octet requête "StartDiagnosticSession"

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: OutputOptionalParameter
Data.Comment: Optional paramaeter for I/O Control Sunroof

Data.Name: OutputOptionalParameter_SR
Data.Comment: Optional paramaeter for I/O Control Sunroof

Data.Name: OutputOptionalParameter_AP
Data.Comment: Optional paramaeter for I/O Control Sunroof

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding/ General Failure Information
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Request.Name: Lecture de la traçabilité du calculateur
Request.Comment: Permet de lire les informations de traçabilité du calculateur

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Spécification du type de diagnostic désiré

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: Ecriture VIN
Request.Comment: Service d'écriture du code VIN dans l'UCE. Non accessible après mise à feu

Request.Name: High Effort Detection
Request.Comment: Permet de connaître l'état des fonctions correction dynamique et code relevé

Request.Name: Start Routine Init and Self Learning
Stop Routine Init and Self Learning
Output Control Move Sunroof AP STOP
Output Control Move Sunroof AP Status

Send.RequestName: Output Control Move Sunroof AP Status
Output Control Move Sunroof AP STOP

Display.RequestName: Output Control Move Sunroof AP Status

Label.Text: Start Routine Init and Self Learning

Send.RequestName: Start Routine Init and Self Learning
Stop Routine Init and Self Learning

Input.RequestName: Start Routine Init and Self Learning

Display.RequestName: Start Routine Init and Self Learning
Lecture de la traçabilité du calculateur
